headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -31.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 132 quotes and a striking 102 at strong intensity, driving the score well above yesterday's already-elevated level.
• The frustrations score of 43.9 sits in the upper third of its 163-day range, signalling a notably active venting day though far from the historical peak.
• Optimism dropped sharply from near-neutral yesterday to -25.4, approaching the lower end of its range, while Fears edged slightly quieter but remains below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
